Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Represents a vehicle alert submitted by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the alert entity.

message.description: The alert message submitted by the user.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the alert was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the alert.

latitude.description: The latitude where the alert was created.

longitude.description: The longitude where the alert was created.

impactForce.description: The G-force or acceleration value measured during a collision event (in m/s^2).

SentAlert.title: Sent Alert
SentAlert.description: Represents a detailed alert sent from the 'Send Alert' form.

driver_name.description: Name of the driver sending the alert.

vehicle_number.description: License plate or identification number of the vehicle.

message.description: The content of the alert message.

timestamp.description: The server-side timestamp of when the alert was sent.

Note.title: Note
Note.description: A to-do item or note for a user.

description.description: The detailed description of the note.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the note was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the note.

definition.description: Collection of vehicle alerts. `alertId` is the unique identifier for each alert.
Stores user profile information, where `userId` is the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

definition.description: A collection of notes for each user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.
